verdict: PMD Clean Pro's 7800 reviews (4.3★) reflect reliability as a premium cleansing brush with proven ability to remove impurities and enhance serum absorption. Strong value for enhancing topical ingredient penetration.

_research.name: PMD Clean Pro Facial Cleansing Brush
pros: Works well with active serums and treatments
_research.con: Cleansing tool only—provides no direct anti-aging benefits without complementary products.
